name: 第1章第1話の朝ベランダ背景
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Cinematic early-summer Sunday morning environment seen from Sato's apartment living room toward the balcony. Show a calm mid-rise Tokyo apartment interior connected to a tidy balcony with pour-over coffee tools, a small plate, potted herbs, soft bedding light, and rooftops beyond with a faint suggestion of the White Heron River district. Emphasize quiet order, fresh air, warm pale gold sunlight, and the elegant beginning of a holiday. Final delivery will be cropped to 1920x1080. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins and leave enough side information for widescreen composition. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, combat, action pose, readable text, collage, split panel, heavy crowd, obvious threat, messy room, luxury penthouse excess
